summary: Tested AI Designer reliability improvements for TemaDom Bulgarian construction platform. All backend API tests passed (13/13). Frontend AI Designer page loads correctly after login with all UI elements visible.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/test-ai returns AI OK with gpt-4o-mini model
BACKEND: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
BACKEND: POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate returns task_id immediately (async confirmed)
BACKEND: Polling responses are lightweight (no base64 in response)
BACKEND: Static fallback budget structure verified
BACKEND: LLM cache system implemented (MD5 hash-based)
BACKEND: Safe LlmChat import with _LLM_AVAILABLE flag
FRONTEND: AI Designer page loads after authentication
FRONTEND: How it works section visible

safe_llm_import.description: LlmChat import wrapped in try/except with _LLM_AVAILABLE flag (lines 20-31 server.py)

gpt_4o_mini.description: Budget generation switched from gpt-4o to gpt-4o-mini (10x cheaper) at lines 336, 3354, 3617

llm_cache.description: Cache system using MD5 hash of prompt (lines 2758-2773 server.py), 200 entry limit

static_fallback_budget.description: _build_static_fallback_budget function (lines 2934-2979) returns 3-tier budget with real Bulgarian store URLs

bg_room_prices.description: BG_ROOM_PRICES table has bathroom/kitchen/living_room/bedroom with economy/medium/premium tiers (lines 2776-2901)

frontend_fallback_notice.description: Orange notice displayed when budget._fallback is true (lines 728-733 AIDesignerPage.jsx)

budget_tiers_display.description: 3 tiers (Иконом/Среден/Премиум) displayed correctly with materials and store links

critical_code_review_comments: All AI Designer reliability improvements correctly implemented
Safe LlmChat import prevents crashes when emergentintegrations not available
gpt-4o-mini model used for budget generation (10x cheaper than gpt-4o)
LLM response cache prevents redundant API calls
Static fallback budget provides reliable 3-tier structure with real Bulgarian store URLs
Frontend correctly displays orange notice when using fallback budget
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Designer reliability improvements all verified: 1) Safe LlmChat import with _LLM_AVAILABLE flag, 2) gpt-4o-mini model (10x cheaper), 3) MD5 hash-based LLM response cache, 4) Static fallback budget with real Bulgarian store URLs, 5) Frontend shows orange fallback notice when budget._fallback=true. Use /app/test_bathroom.jpg for photo upload testing.
